content:
* We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation. For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day. We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region. We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands. We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture. We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
* Nous reconnaissons que nous sommes réunis sur le territoire traditionnel et non cédé de la nation algonquine anishinaabe. Depuis des générations, ils sont les gardiens de cette terre et le lien profond qui les unit à elle perdure encore aujourd'hui. Nous reconnaissons la présence et les contributions durables du peuple algonquin dans cette région. Nous reconnaissons également l'histoire douloureuse de la colonisation et du déplacement des communautés autochtones de leurs terres ancestrales. Nous nous engageons à apprendre, à comprendre et à honorer l'histoire et la culture de la nation algonquine. Nous reconnaissons l'importance de travailler en collaboration pour créer un avenir plus juste et plus équitable pour tous ceux qui vivent sur cette terre.
________________
sentences: * We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation.
For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day.
We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region.
We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands.
We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture.
We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
* Nous reconnaissons que nous sommes réunis sur le territoire traditionnel et non cédé de la nation algonquine anishinaabe.
Depuis des générations, ils sont les gardiens de cette terre et le lien profond qui les unit à elle perdure encore aujourd'hui.
Nous reconnaissons la présence et les contributions durables du peuple algonquin dans cette région.
Nous reconnaissons également l'histoire douloureuse de la colonisation et du déplacement des communautés autochtones de leurs terres ancestrales.
Nous nous engageons à apprendre, à comprendre et à honorer l'histoire et la culture de la nation algonquine.

Nous reconnaissons l'importance de travailler en collaboration pour créer un avenir plus juste et plus équitable pour tous ceux qui vivent sur cette terre.
________________

* Meet with Engiqueers, Daniel and Ashna, and JMTS team Captains to talk about each of their events. Some great ideas, everyone seems excited!
* Booking rooms for events with Jake. UOSU wants this done by the 24th so Jake is taking care of it while I am away. Only issue right now is getting a bowling alley for a dry night which is an accessible venue, still searching!
* Faculty is being confusing about the replacement room for A04 and are now saying that it will be finished renos in time for 101 week
* Attended Social Round tables and Joint Round tables

content:
* Maria: it’s been cleared out by eng outreach and should be good to use now
* I understand UOSU has their deadlines from C&R but we will be able to work something out as long as we have made attempts to coordinate properly
* It should be ready by the fall, but we can get a paper trail for this so that we can take it to them and ask for another room
* We’re going to track the timeline for this
* There aren’t any other rooms available that we can use for the whole week so we’re not sure what we’ll do if CBY A04 can’t be used
* Internal: hiring
* Just to clarify for those waiting to hire commissioners, you’ve already been sent the information of those who applied to be commissioners and you’re expected to conduct the hiring process for that
* I’m only doing the Manager selection process
* There’s two people who are interested in Secretary
* Let me know if you need any clarification
* We’re going to wait for next meeting for the Manager of External Awareness, because someone replied today with interest in doing an interview (the email had gone to spam)

* BE IT RESOLVED THAT the Officers hereby appoint Henri Pigeon as Manager of Sponsorships for the 2025-2026 term.
Adopted with unanimous consent.

content:
* The bid would either be placed at FYIC or CALE
* The main expense would be accomodation
* This can be mostly covered with delegate fees
* We need to consider whether we have enough engagement as a society
* 101 week will be a good opportunity to gauge this
* We need to look for first and second year students who might be interested in joining the organizing committee, since they will still be around when this conference is held
* We need a dedicated team to avoid the issues we’ve had with organising previous conferences, this is more important than the finances of the society as a determining factor as to whether this is feasible
sentences:

*

*

* 101 week will be a good opportunity to gauge this
*

*

We need a dedicated team to avoid the issues we’ve had with organising previous conferences, this is more important than the finances of the society as a determining factor as to whether this is feasible

content:
* Next week!
* Fill out the spreadsheet in advance so that we’re not scrambling last minute
* Chair: VP Social is not in Ottawa which is a violation of the requirements for the position
* This will be raised at the BoD meeting on Sunday
* Received advice that it’s especially important for the VP Social to be there for August
* The Presidents knew about this but did not raise it with the team
* We need to be more open about these things in the future
* Internal: absent officers at meetings
* Some officers have been excused
* One of the VPs hasn’t showed up to any meetings so far
